summary: Vendor Extraction Profiles (10-part spec) fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: VEP section in Vendor Intelligence detail panel shows Active badge, Reference Priority, Label Bias, Confidence Adjustments, Generate/Toggle/Reset buttons. Matching Debug panel shows Vendor Extraction Profile section with 'active' badge, Reference Priority, Label Bias display, extraction_profile_bias in score breakdown (teal coloring). All scoring model integration working: extraction_profile_bias component (max 0.15 boost, -0.10 penalty), vendor influence cap includes profile bias.
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 VEP endpoints working correctly with proper response structures
Profile model includes all required fields: vendor_no, vendor_name, document_type_bias, reference_priority_order, reference_label_bias, confidence_adjustments, enabled, learning_source
Scoring model component #12 (extraction_profile_bias) integrates correctly with max 0.15 boost / -0.10 penalty caps
Vendor influence cap (0.20 max) correctly includes vendor_behavior_bonus + label_correction_boost + extraction_profile_bias (positive only)
GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/matching-debug correctly includes vendor_extraction_profile field with has_profile, reference_priority_order, reference_label_bias
POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/matching-debug/rerun includes extraction_profile_bias in score breakdown and extraction_profile_applied in decision diagnostics
Frontend VEP section in VendorDetailPanel displays Active/Disabled badge, Reference Priority arrows, Label Bias with boost percentages, Confidence Adjustments
Frontend MatchingDebugPanel shows Vendor Extraction Profile section with teal score bar coloring for extraction_profile_bias
Admin controls (toggle/reset) work correctly - toggle updates enabled status, reset deletes profile which regenerates on next learning cycle
Profile auto-generation from vendor_intelligence + correction_feedback data works correctly (3 profiles auto-generated at startup)
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 3 profiles auto-generated at startup for Cargo Modules LLC (has label_bias PO→SHIPMENT, confidence_adjustments posted_sales_shipment_boost:+12%), Tumalo Creek Transportation, TUMALO CREEK Transportation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Extraction Profiles feature fully functional. 3 profiles exist: Cargo Modules LLC (freight_invoice bias, has label_bias), Tumalo Creek Transportation (freight_invoice), TUMALO CREEK Transportation (purchase_invoice). Key test document: 80c7ab51-0cdb-48cc-b39c-b5d8a9c27c85 (Cargo Modules). Safety caps enforced: MAX_MATCH_BOOST=0.15, MAX_MATCH_PENALTY=-0.10, MAX_LABEL_BIAS=0.15. Vendor influence cap 0.20 includes profile bias. Background learning runs every 3600 seconds. MIN_DOCS_FOR_PROFILE=5 (vendors with < 5 docs cannot have profiles generated).

GET /api/vendor-extraction-profiles.evidence: Returns array with 3 profiles, each containing vendor_no, vendor_name, document_type_bias, reference_priority_order, reference_label_bias, confidence_adjustments, enabled, learning_source

GET /api/vendor-extraction-profiles/{ven.evidence: Returns Cargo Modules LLC profile with document_type_bias=freight_invoice, reference_priority_order=[purchase_order, posted_purchase_invoice, posted_sales_shipment, sales_order]

POST /api/vendor-extraction-profiles/{ve.evidence: Successfully regenerates profile for Cargo Modules LLC

POST /api/vendor-extraction-profiles/gen.evidence: Returns vendors_evaluated, profiles_created, profiles_updated, skipped counts

POST /api/vendor-extraction-profiles/{ve.evidence: Successfully toggles profile enabled status, verified via GET endpoint
Returns {status: 'reset'}, profile is deleted (regenerated on next cycle)

GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/matching-deb.evidence: Returns vendor_extraction_profile with has_profile=true, reference_priority_order, reference_label_bias, confidence_adjustments for doc 80c7ab51

POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/matching-de.evidence: Score breakdown includes extraction_profile_bias component (0.0571 for test doc), decision.extraction_profile_applied present

Frontend VendorIntelligencePage VEP sect.evidence: VendorExtractionProfileSection visible in vendor detail panel with Active badge, Reference Priority arrows, Label Bias (PO→SHIPMENT +6%), Confidence Adjustments (+12%, +5%), Generate/Toggle/Reset buttons

Frontend MatchingDebugPanel VEP section.evidence: Vendor Extraction Profile section with 'active' badge, Reference Priority, Label Bias display, teal coloring for extraction_profile_bias in score breakdown

Scoring model extraction_profile_bias co.evidence: Component #12 in scoring model, max 0.15 boost / -0.10 penalty, vendor influence cap includes profile bias

Profile auto-generation from existing da.evidence: 3 profiles auto-generated at startup from vendor_intelligence_profiles + reference_label_corrections data

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. No mocked integrations.
